title: Selecting text
drDigitalIntro: Selecting text tells the computer which words you want to work with. There are lots of ways: click and drag across words, double-click to select one word, triple-click to select a whole line or paragraph, hold Shift and press the arrow keys to stretch your selection, or press Command+A to select everything at once.
drDigitalSuccess: That's a whole toolkit for selecting text — pick whichever way feels easiest!
drDigitalHint: Read through the different ways to select, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
